steps.title: Target the origin claim
steps.content: The underlined claim says guinea pigs in Puerto Rico probably came from Colombia and descended from Colombian guinea pigs. The strongest weakening evidence would directly challenge that ancestry.

steps.title: Use genetic evidence
steps.content: Choice A only says guinea pigs appear in art. Choice C would support Colombia as a likely source. Choice D discusses modern appearance, not ancient origin. Evidence that Puerto Rican guinea pigs were genetically closer to Peruvian ones directly weakens the Colombian-origin claim. The answer is B.
